security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' media: http://media.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; media-src 'self' media: http://media.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:*; frame-src https://maps.google.com https://www.google.com
